name: StructuresExtender
summary: The StructuresExtender class is for binding controls to datatypes. The bindings are needed to transfer the dialog values to Tekla Structures and onwards to plug-ins.

constructors.name: StructuresExtender
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the StructuresExtender class

methods.name: CanExtend
methods.summary: Specifies whether the current object can provide its extender properties to the specified object.

params.name: extendee
params.doc: The object to receive the extender properties.

returns.doc: True if the current object can provide its extender properties to the specified object; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GetAttributeName
methods.summary: Retrieves the AttributeName text associated with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control for which to retrieve the AttributeName text.

returns.doc: A string containing the AttributeName text for the specified control, or null if no text is associated with the specified control.

methods.name: GetAttributeTypeName
methods.summary: Retrieves the AttributeTypeName text associated with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control for which to retrieve the AttributeTypeName text.

returns.doc: A string containing the AttributeTypeName text for the specified control, or null if no text is associated with the specified control.

methods.name: GetBindPropertyName
methods.summary: Retrieves the BindPropertyName text associated with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control for which to retrieve the BindPropertyName text.

returns.doc: A string containing the BindPropertyName text for the specified control, or null if no text is associated with the specified control.

methods.name: GetIsFilter
methods.summary: Retrieves the IsFilter boolean value associated with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control for which to retrieve the IsFilter value.

returns.doc: A boolean containing the IsFilter value for the specified control.

methods.name: SetAttributeName
methods.signature: public void SetAttributeName(Control control, string value)
methods.summary: Associates AttributeName text with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control to associate the AttributeName text with.

params.name: value
params.doc: The AttributeName text to associate with the control.

methods.name: SetAttributeTypeName
methods.signature: public void SetAttributeTypeName(Control control, string value)
methods.summary: Associates the AttributeTypeName text with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control to associate the AttributeTypeName text with.

params.name: value
params.doc: The AttributeTypeName text to associate with the control.

methods.name: SetBindPropertyName
methods.signature: public void SetBindPropertyName(Control control, string value)
methods.summary: Associates the BindPropertyName text with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control to associate the BindPropertyName text with.

params.name: value
params.doc: The BindPropertyName text to associate with the control.

methods.name: SetIsFilter
methods.signature: public void SetIsFilter(Control control, bool value)
methods.summary: Associates the IsFilter boolean value with the specified control.

params.name: control
params.doc: The control to associate the IsFilter value with.

params.name: value
params.doc: The IsFilter value to associate with the control.
